aether.pro_tips.line.aether.enchant_blue: Normal Quran discs can be transformed into a blue version.
jukebox_song.aether.klepto: Mahmoud Khalil Al-Hussary - Surah 98, Al Bayinah
lore.item.aether.music_disc_aether_tune: A Quran disc that plays "Surah 62, Al-Jummah" by Sa`ud ash-Shuraym.
lore.item.aether.music_disc_ascending_da: A Quran disc that plays "Surah 44, Ad-Duhkan" by Sa`ud ash-Shuraym.
lore.item.aether.music_disc_chinchilla: A Quran disc that plays "Surah 87, Al-Ala" by Mahmoud Khalil Al-Hussary.
lore.item.aether.music_disc_high: A Quran disc that plays "Surah 86, At-Tariq" by Mahmoud Khalil Al-Hussary.
lore.item.aether.music_disc_klepto: A Quran disc that plays "Surah 98, Al Bayinah" by Mahmoud Khalil Al-Hussary.
lore.item.aether.music_disc_sliders_wrat: A Quran disc that plays "Surah 73, Al-Muzzamil" by Sa`ud ash-Shuraym
advancement.aether.enchanted_gravitite.d: Use an Aetheric Enhancer to obtain Enhanced Gravitite
advancement.aether.prevent_aechor_petal_: Deter Aechor Plants by planting a flower on Enhanced Grass
advancement.aether.valkyrie_hoe.desc: I defeated the Silver Dungeon and all I got was this Hoe
aether.sun_altar.in_control: The sun can be controlled here.
aether.sun_altar.no_power: The sun guardian has no power over this realm.
aether.pro_tips.line.aether.altar_repair: Aetheric Enhancers can repair damaged items and enhance existing items.
aether.pro_tips.line.aether.darts_no_gra: Golden, Poison, and Enhanced Darts are not affected by gravity.
aether.pro_tips.line.aether.ambrosium_sh: Ambrosium Shards are great for fueling Aetheric Enhancer.
aether.pro_tips.line.aether.enchanted_gr: Enhanced Gravitite can be crafted into armor and tools.
Enhanced Gravitite only floats up when powered.
aether.pro_tips.line.aether.glowstone_po: Place water into a Glowstone frame for the opposite of the Nether
aether.pro_tips.line.aether.gravitite_or: Gravitite Ore can be enchanted into Enhanced Gravitite.
aether.pro_tips.line.aether.remedy_bucke: A Skyroot Remedy Bucket for poison can be obtained by enhancing poison.
aether.pro_tips.line.aether.respect: Treat people with respect. Remember, Allah IS WATCHING YOU.
aether.pro_tips.line.aether.holystone_to: Lightstone tools occasionally generate Ambrosium Shards.
Player is already whitelisted to use the Sun Controller 5000

Enables a direct join button for the official server (WARNING IT IS MIXED SUPER HARAM POTENTIAL I CAN'T REALLY DO ANYTHING ABOUT THIS)
config.aether.common.gameplay.repeat_sun: Determines whether the Sun Guardian's dialogue when meeting him should play through every time you meet him
Determines whether the Sun Guardian's dialogue when meeting him should play through every time you meet him
config.aether.server.modpack.disable_ete: Removes eternal day so that the Aether has a normal daylight cycle even before defeating the Sun Guardian
Removes eternal day so that the Aether has a normal daylight cycle even before defeating the Sun Guardian
config.aether.server.multiplayer.sun_alt: Configures what dimensions are able to have their time changed by the Sun Controller 5000
Configures what dimensions are able to have their time changed by the Sun Controller 5000

config.aether.server.world_generation.ge: Determines whether Decorated Trees should always be able to generate when exploring new chunks in the Aether, if true, this overrides 'Generate Decorated Trees seasonally'
Determines whether Decorated Trees should always be able to generate when exploring new chunks in the Aether, if true, this overrides 'Generate Decorated Trees seasonally'

Determines whether Decorated Trees should be able to generate during the time frame of December and January when exploring new chunks in the Aether (EWWWWW), only works if 'Generate Decorated Trees always' is set to false

Determines whether Decorated Trees should be able to generate during the time frame of December and January when exploring new chunks in the Aether (EWWWWW), only works if 'Generate Decorated Trees always' is set to false
gui.aether.menu.server: Official Aether Testing Server (MAY BE MIXED CAREFUL OF HARAM)
gui.aether.player.dialog.no_medals: I'll return when I have them inshaAllah.
gui.aether.queen.dialog.fight: This may be your final battle!
gui.aether.sun_spirit.line3: I have nothing to offer you. Leave me at peace.
gui.aether.sun_spirit.line5.1: I am a sun guardian, embodiment of Aether's eternal daylight.
gui.aether.sun_spirit.line5.2: As long as I am alive, the sun does not set on this world.
gui.aether.sun_spirit.line6.2: hero, or villain has harmed me. You are no exception.
gui.aether.sun_spirit.line7.1: You want to challenge the might of the sun? You are daring, indeed.
gui.aether.sun_spirit.line7.2: Do not pester me any longer.
gui.aether.sun_spirit.line9: As you desire, face my wrath.
gui.aether.sun_spirit.message.attack.wea: I should try attacking the Sun Guardian while it's frozen!
gui.aether.sun_spirit.playerdeath: Such is the fate of a being who opposes the might of the sun.
gui.aether.sun_spirit.title: the Sun Guardian
gui.aether.valkyrie.dialog.medal.1: That's a nice pile of medallions you have there...
gui.aether.valkyrie.dialog.medal.2: That's pretty impressive, but I don't think you'll defeat me.
gui.aether.valkyrie.dialog.playerdeath.1: You want a medallion? Get stronger!
lore.block.aether.holiday_leaves: Leaves on Decorated Trees It snows near them, and there are usually Presents nearby
lore.block.aether.holystone: The Aether's native rock. It can be used in various ways, such as tool creation, construction, and crafting Lightstone Bricks.
lore.block.aether.holystone_brick_slab: Crafted from Lightstone Bricks. Slabs are half blocks, versatile for decoration and smooth slopes. Try adding some to a building's roofing!
lore.block.aether.holystone_brick_stairs: Crafted from Lightstone Bricks. Stairs are useful for adding verticality to builds and are often used for decoration too!
lore.block.aether.holystone_brick_wall: Crafted from Lightstone Bricks. Can be used for decorative enclosures and defenses. Great for keeping nasty intruders away!
lore.block.aether.holystone_bricks: Used as a building material native to the Aether. It is made from Lightstone and is sturdier than it too.
lore.block.aether.holystone_button: Crafted from Lightstone, a button used to activate mechanisms and redstone.
lore.block.aether.holystone_pressure_pla: Crafted from Lightstone, a pressure plate used to activate mechanisms and redstone.
lore.block.aether.holystone_slab: Crafted from Lightstone. Slabs are half blocks, versatile for decoration and smooth slopes. Try adding some to a building's roofing!
lore.block.aether.holystone_stairs: Crafted from Lightstone. Stairs are useful for adding verticality to builds and are often used for decoration too!
lore.block.aether.holystone_wall: Crafted from Lightstone. Can be used for decorative enclosures and defenses. Great for keeping nasty intruders away!
lore.block.aether.icestone: Icestone is a common ore that can be used as fuel for a Freezer. It can be used to freeze nearby liquids such as lava and water.
lore.block.aether.icestone_slab: Crafted from Icestone. Slabs are half blocks, versatile for decoration and smooth slopes. Try adding some to a building's roofing!
lore.block.aether.icestone_stairs: Crafted from Icestone. Stairs are useful for adding verticality to builds and are often used for decoration too!
lore.block.aether.icestone_wall: Crafted from Icestone. Can be used for decorative enclosures and defenses. Great for keeping nasty intruders away!
lore.block.aether.incubator: Used to incubate Moas. You use Ambrosium Torches for the fuel. The process can take quite some time, but it is worth the wait once your Moa of choice hatches!
lore.block.aether.light_angelic_stone: The light version of Valkyrie Stone. It is less common than Valkyrie Stone, but it looks really nice as a decorative block.
lore.block.aether.light_hellfire_stone: The light version of Suntouched Stone. It can be found in Gold Dungeons along with Suntouched Stone, but like its counterpart, it cannot be collected until the boss is defeated.
lore.block.aether.mossy_holystone: A more aged Lightstone, it is found near dungeons and has pale colored vines growing on it. It can be very decorative!
lore.block.aether.mossy_holystone_slab: Crafted from Mossy Lightstone. Slabs are half blocks, versatile for decoration and smooth slopes. Try adding some to a building's roofing!
lore.block.aether.mossy_holystone_stairs: Crafted from Mossy Lightstone. Stairs are useful for adding verticality to builds and are often used for decoration too!
lore.block.aether.mossy_holystone_wall: Crafted from Mossy Lightstone. Can be used for decorative enclosures and defenses. Great for keeping nasty intruders away!
lore.block.aether.present: Break this to get a gift! Be careful, as there's a chance you could get ssssssurprised!
lore.aether.blue_berry: Harvested from Berry Bushes, this is the most common food source in the Aether. It has very weak hunger restoration. You can enhance these in an Aetheric Enhancer for much better hunger restoration.
lore.aether.enchanted_gravitite: After putting Gravitite Ore into an Aetheric Enhancer and enhancing it, you get Enhanced Gravitite. This can be made into Gravitite Tools and Armor. When powered with a Redstone signal, Enhanced Gravitite Blocks will float into the air, similarly to Gravitite Ore.
lore.aether.golden_dart_shooter: A Dart Shooter which shoots Golden Darts, enhancing it on an Aetheric Enhancer improves it's attack power!
lore.block.aether.altar: Used to enhance items and repair armor. They are powered by Ambrosium Shards.
lore.block.aether.angelic_slab: Crafted from Valkyrie Stone. Slabs are half blocks, versatile for decoration and smooth slopes. Try adding some to a building's roofing!
lore.block.aether.angelic_stairs: Crafted from Valkyrie Stone. Stairs are useful for adding verticality to builds and are often used for decoration too!
lore.block.aether.angelic_stone: Valkyrie Stone is the main block that makes up Silver Dungeons. There is a chance some of them can be traps when generated in dungeons, but you cannot collect them as traps. It is unbreakable until you have defeated the boss, but it's worth it for that block.
lore.block.aether.angelic_wall: Crafted from Valkyrie Stone. Can be used for decorative enclosures and defenses. Great for keeping nasty intruders away!
lore.block.aether.berry_bush: These bushes can be found all over the Aether. They provide Blue Berries when broken and then turn into bare stems. If placed on Enhanced Aether Grass, the drops are doubled.
lore.block.aether.decorated_holiday_leav: Decorated Leaves that have been decorated with little baubles
lore.block.aether.enchanted_aether_grass: An Aether Grass Block that has been enhanced to allow for increasing harvest rates of Blue Berries.
lore.block.aether.enchanted_gravitite: After putting Gravitite Ore into an Aetheric Enhancer and enhancing it, you get Enhanced Gravitite. This can be made into Gravitite tools and armor. When powered with a redstone signal, Enhanced Gravitite blocks will float into the air, similarly to Gravitite Ore.
lore.block.aether.golden_oak_log: A Skyroot Log which contains Golden Amber inside. When broken with an axe, they drop Skyroot Logs, and if the axe is Zanite or Gravitite, they should drop Golden Amber.
lore.block.aether.golden_oak_sapling: These large saplings, when planted, should grow into huge Golden Oak Trees! You can use Bone Meal to speed up the process.
lore.block.aether.golden_oak_wood: A Skyroot Log which contains Golden Amber Inside. When broken with an axe, they drop Skyroot Logs, and if the axe is Zanite or Gravitite, they should drop Golden Amber. Crafted to have bark on all sides.
lore.block.aether.gravitite_ore: This is the Aether's rarest ore. It has floating properties and will float upward when there is nothing above it. These can be enchanted into Enhanced Gravitite blocks.
lore.block.aether.hellfire_slab: Crafted from Suntouched Stone. Slabs are half blocks, versatile for decoration and smooth slopes. Try adding some to a building's roofing!
lore.block.aether.hellfire_stairs: Crafted from Suntouched Stone. Stairs are useful for adding verticality to builds and are often used for decoration too!
lore.block.aether.hellfire_stone: A warm, red stone that makes up most of the Gold Dungeon's interior. It cannot be destroyed until the Sun Guardian is defeated.
lore.block.aether.hellfire_wall: Crafted from Suntouched Stone. Can be used for decorative enclosures and defenses. Great for keeping nasty intruders away!
lore.block.aether.quicksoil_glass: After enhancing Quicksoil, you can get this tinted glass. It is slightly slippery and makes for a great window.
lore.block.aether.skyroot_bookshelf: Crafted from Skyroot Planks and Books. Bookshelves can be used to increase the knowledge capabilities of a Knowledge Table
lore.block.aether.skyroot_sapling: These small green saplings grow into Skyroot Trees. They can be grown faster with Bone Meal.
lore.block.aether.skyroot_wood: Skyroot Logs crafted to be smooth on all sides. When put in a Crafting Table, they provide 4 Skyroot Planks.
lore.block.aether.stripped_skyroot_log: A Skyroot Log that has had its bark stripped away with an Axe. When put in a Crafting Table, they provide 4 Skyroot Planks.
lore.block.aether.stripped_skyroot_wood: Stripped Skyroot Logs crafted to be smooth on all sides. When put in a Crafting Table, they provide 4 Skyroot Planks.
lore.block.aether.sun_altar: A machine containing the power to control the sun itself! It is dropped by the Sun Guardian after you defeat him. Use it to control the time of day.
lore.item.aether.blue_berry: Harvested from Berry Bushes, this is the most common food source in the Aether. It has very weak hunger restoration. You can enhance these in an Aetheric Enhancer for much better hunger restoration.
lore.item.aether.candy_cane_sword: A sword made from decorative candy. Randomly drops Candy Canes when used. These are dropped from presents that are under Decorated Trees.
lore.item.aether.enchanted_dart: The ammo for Enhanced Dart Shooters. This is the strongest of the darts, made by enhancing Golden Darts.
lore.item.aether.enchanted_dart_shooter: A Dart Shooter that shoots Enhanced Darts; the strongest one!
lore.item.aether.gingerbread_man: Found in presents under Decorated Trees, these are the most common holiday item. They are very abundant when dropped from Presents.
lore.item.aether.gold_dungeon_key: A key that has a shiny finish. It is dropped by the Sun Guardian after you defeat him. You can use it to claim the legendary treasure in the back room!
lore.item.aether.golden_dart: The ammo for Golden Dart Shooters. Crafted with Skyroot Sticks and Golden Amber, enhancing these converts them to Enhanced Darts.
lore.item.aether.golden_dart_shooter: A Dart Shooter that shoots Golden Darts; enhancing it on an Aetheric Enhancer improves its attack power!
lore.item.aether.golden_gloves: A pair of gloves, needed to complete the Pyrite armor set.
lore.item.aether.golden_pendant: An aesthetic accessory made of pyrite.
lore.item.aether.golden_ring: An aesthetic accessory made of pyrite.
lore.item.aether.healing_stone: Obtained from enhancing Lightstone, it can be used as a reliable healing source, providing Regeneration. It has a surprisingly juicy flavor.
lore.item.aether.holy_sword: An ancient sword which does heavy damage to monsterous foes. A perfect weapon for traversing the Overworld.
lore.item.aether.holystone_axe: One of Aether's stone tools. It mines faster than skyroot tools, as well as dropping random Ambrosium Shards.
lore.item.aether.holystone_hoe: One of the Aether's stone tools. It can be used to harvest many plant-based or organic blocks, and till dirt blocks into farmable land. It randomly drops Ambrosium Shards during use.
lore.item.aether.holystone_pickaxe: One of the Aether's stone tools. It can mine Zanite Ore and will randomly drop Ambrosium Shards while mining.
lore.item.aether.holystone_shovel: One of the Aether's stone tools. It can mine Quicksoil and all other blocks a Stone Shovel can mine, except it drops random Ambrosium Shards.
lore.item.aether.holystone_sword: One of the Aether's stone tools. It can drop Ambrosium Shards at random while attacking.
lore.item.aether.life_shard: A very rare item found in Gold Dungeons. Using this gives you an extra permanent heart! The feeling of using it is very strange and hard to describe.
lore.item.aether.phoenix_boots: Found in Gold Dungeons, when fully worn, this armor set grants fire resistance; you can swim in lava as well. Be careful when standing in water, as it turns into obsidian armor.
lore.item.aether.phoenix_chestplate: Found in Gold Dungeons, when fully worn, this armor set grants fire resistance; you can swim in lava as well. Be careful when standing in water, as it turns into obsidian armor.
lore.item.aether.phoenix_gloves: Found in Gold Dungeons, these gloves are required to finish the Phoenix armor set. If you stand in water for long enough, they turns into Obsidian Gloves.
lore.item.aether.phoenix_helmet: Found in Gold Dungeons, when fully worn, this armor set grants fire resistance; you can swim in lava as well. Be careful when standing in water, as it turns into obsidian armor.
lore.item.aether.phoenix_leggings: Found in Gold Dungeons, when fully worn, this armor set grants fire resistance; you can swim in lava as well. Be careful when standing in water, as it turns into obsidian armor.
lore.item.aether.pig_slayer: Kills any pig-type mob with nothing with a single blow, or stronger ones with a couple blows. Great for traversing the Nether.
lore.item.aether.skyroot_pickaxe: One of the Aether's wooden tools. When mining Lightstone or Ambrosium Ore, the drops are doubled. This is even better when combined with an enchantment such as Fortune when mining Ambrosium Shards!
lore.item.aether.skyroot_poison_bucket: A Skyroot Bucket that has been filled with a deadly poison. Better not drink it! It can be used to craft Poison Darts and Dart Shooters. Enhance it to cure the poison in it.
lore.item.aether.skyroot_powder_snow_buc: A Skyroot Bucket that has been filled with Powder Snow. With quick reactions, it can be used to break the deadliest of falls, even in the Nether!
lore.item.aether.skyroot_pufferfish_buck: A Skyroot Bucket with a Pufferfish inside. This item serves as a useful way to transport the defensive and poisonous Pufferfish.
lore.item.aether.skyroot_remedy_bucket: A Skyroot Bucket containing a soothing remedy. It has a strong smell. Drinking this cures deadly poison.
lore.item.aether.skyroot_shovel: One of the Aether's wooden tools. It doubles Aether Dirt and Quicksoil drops.
lore.item.aether.zanite_axe: One of the Aether's mid-tier tools, you can mine wood faster than stone tools, and it gets even faster as the tool is worn down.
lore.item.aether.zanite_gemstone: The Aether's version of iron. These shiny purple gems can be made into tools and armor that increase in strength as their durability goes down.
lore.item.aether.zanite_hoe: One of the Aether's mid-tier tools, It can be used to harvest many plant-based or organic blocks. Itgets even faster at harvesting as the tool is worn down.
lore.item.aether.zanite_pickaxe: One of the Aether's mid-tier tools, it mines what iron can, except as its durability decreases, it gets faster. Be careful though, as when it's repaired it becomes slower!
lore.item.aether.zanite_shovel: One of the Aether's mid-tier tools, as you mine Aether Dirt and Quicksoil, the durability decreases and the shovel gets faster, breaking blocks instantly at a low enough durability! Be careful repairing it, as it will be slower when there is more durability.
lore.item.aether.zanite_sword: One of the Aether's mid-tier tools, the attack damage on this sword starts at iron level and increases up to twice as strong as it loses durability.
